'''Palestro's Wholesale Firearms''' was a corporation that specialized in the creation and sale of advanced weaponry. Based primarily on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], the company secretly supported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The owner of the company, [[Palestro]], was known for assisting local Rebel cells in obtaining necessary supplies and weapons.
